slides.headline: The Gap in the Funnel
slides.subheadline: Core dna powers every touchpoint — except the highest-stakes one
bullets: Sales teams spend 40%+ of time building decks, not building relationships
Every proposal is manually rebuilt from scratch
Brand inconsistency across sales materials erodes trust
Personalization stops at the website — never reaches the pitch
The CMS is full of rich content no salesperson ever uses

slides.headline: FlowPitch: The Last-Mile Activation Layer
slides.subheadline: Core dna manages the content. FlowPitch makes it customer-convincing.
bullets: API-connected to Core dna's content engine
Generates account-specific presentations from structured content
Adapts by industry, persona, and funnel stage automatically
White-labelable — your brand, your client's language
From structured content to tailored conversation
